entity.label: Sephar
entity.subtitle: Mountain
entity.description: Numbering, (Gen. 10:30), supposed by some to be the ancient Himyaritic capital, “Shaphar,” Zaphar, on the Indian Ocean, between the Persian Gulf and the Red Sea.

nodes.label: Sephar
nodes.description: Numbering, (Gen. 10:30), supposed by some to be the ancient Himyaritic capital, “Shaphar,” Zaphar, on the Indian Ocean, between the Persian Gulf and the Red Sea.

verses.text: And their dwelling was from Mesha, as thou goest unto Sephar a mount of the east.
